ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the artist */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the artist */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the artist's account */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the artist joined the platform */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* File path to the artist's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Artist bio */,
  "location" TEXT /* Artist location */,
  "website" TEXT /* Artist website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "art_pieces" (
  "art_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each art piece */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the art piece */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the art piece */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the art piece was uploaded */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who uploaded the art piece */,
  "medium" TEXT /* Medium used to create the art piece */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the art piece */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the art piece */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("art_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_art_pieces_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "art_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "art_piece_categories" (
  "art_id" INTEGER /* ID of the art piece */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("art_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* File path to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "art_id" INTEGER /* ID of the art piece being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for replies) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_art_id FOREIGN KEY ("art_id") REFERENCES art_pieces ("art_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "art_id" INTEGER /* ID of the art piece being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the rating */,
  "rating_value" INTEGER /* Value of the rating (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_art_id FOREIGN KEY ("art_id") REFERENCES art_pieces ("art_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the collection */,
  "collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collections_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collection_art_pieces" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collection */,
  "art_id" INTEGER /* ID of the art piece */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the art piece was added to the collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id", "art_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderation_history" (
  "moderation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderation event */,
  "art_id" INTEGER /* ID of the art piece being moderated */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being moderated */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator */,
  "moderation_date" TEXT /* Date the moderation occurred */,
  "moderation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the moderation */,
  "moderation_action" TEXT /* Action taken by the moderator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("moderation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_history_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_history_art_id FOREIGN KEY ("art_id") REFERENCES art_pieces ("art_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_history_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES moderators ("moderator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderators" (
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderator */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the moderator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the moderator */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the moderator's account */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the moderator joined the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("moderator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "artist1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first artist */,
  "artist2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second artist */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date the collaboration occurred */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_collaborations_artist1_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist1_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_collaborations_artist2_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist2_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "art_series" (
  "series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each series */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the series */,
  "series_name" TEXT /* Name of the series */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_art_series_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "art_piece_series" (
  "art_id" INTEGER /* ID of the art piece */,
  "series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the series */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the art piece was added to the series */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("art_id", "series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "art_piece_tags" (
  "art_id" INTEGER /* ID of the art piece */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("art_id", "tag_id")
)
